g.text: Interaction States — Cards, Filter Bar, Search, Column Headers
All interactive states — default, hover, active/dragging, filter-active, focused — with CSS/behavior notes
Chips look like ghost buttons. No active count. No 'Clear' link.
Active chip: cross-hatch fill + thicker border + value shown + ×
Clear all link appears at end of bar. Inactive filters still visible as ghost chips.
SECTION 3 — SEARCH INPUT & COLUMN HEADER HOVER
Cursor: pointer on +, default on title
transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease (card lift)
transition: opacity 150ms ease, background 150ms ease (filter chips, column header)
